falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 rises by more than 5% in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong upward move would contradict the pattern's implication of a bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal.
A blowoff score above 60 would indicate imminent blowoff top dynamics, directly opposing the current bottom pattern analysis.

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX index drops below 15 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extremely low volatility (below 15) would suggest market complacency, refuting the risk-on environment implied by the bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
